extraction.one_line_summary: DOWSETT attacked solo with one finishing circuit lap remaining after the final climb, held 25-second gap through hesitation, won by over a minute.
tactical_patterns: DOWSETT second attack created winning move after first effort dropped him; persistence on same climb pays dividends.
Peloton hesitation at 1-lap-to-go allowed DOWSETT gap to expand from 25s back to race-winning margin.
Trek-Segafredo forced peloton after crashes reunited break, revealing concern about breakaway quality threatening stage result.

rider_signals.DOWSETT Alex: positive: won from late solo move after being dropped earlier, showed tactical intelligence attacking twice same climb
rider_signals.HOLMES Matthew: positive: collected 20 KOM points plus third place, active throughout breakaway suggests strong form
rider_signals.PUCCIO Salvatore: positive: second breakaway appearance this race, finished second in final sprint, team using opportunistically
rider_signals.BRAMBILLA Gianluca: neutral: crashed but continued after medical check, persistence notable but no performance signal
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: neutral: retained pink by 43 seconds over BILBAO, survived without testing ahead of mountain stages
